message:
🐛 Filter clusters with slash in name from localStorage cache (#10343)

The saveClusterCacheToStorage function was not filtering out clusters
whose names contain slashes (auto-generated OpenShift context names
like "default/api-*.openshiftapps.com:6443/kube:admin"). This caused
the shared-cache-fetch test assertion to fail.

Add a filter to exclude slash-containing cluster names from the
persistent localStorage cache, matching the test expectation and
preventing auto-generated context names from polluting the cache.

Fixes #10338

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
